channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: NASA Artemis II: The SLS Rocket Arrives at Pad 39B for Launch in April
item.description:
Four astronauts are going into quarantine at Kennedy Space Center's Launch Pad 39B for the April 1 crewed lunar liftoff. NASA's Artemis II SLS rocket and Orion capsule have arrived.

Key points:
• The 322-foot-tall SLS rocket arrived at Launch Pad 39B on March 20 after an 11-hour journey aboard NASA's crawler-transporter 2 from the Vehicle Assembly Building.
• Launch is targeted for no earlier than April 1, 2026 at 6:24 p.m. ET, with backup windows on April 2–6 and April 30.
• The four-person crew — NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, and Christina Koch, and CSA astronaut Jeremy Hansen — will fly a 10-day free-return trajectory around the Moon, the first crewed lunar mission since Apollo 17 in 1972.
• An earlier helium flow issue in the rocket's upper stage, which had pushed the launch from March to April, has since been resolved by fixing a blocked seal in a cable connecting the rocket to ground systems.

Read the full article: NASA Artemis II: The SLS Rocket Arrives at Pad 39B for Launch in April

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
